title: CreatiVault OpenAPI Actor
description: Run CreatiVault OpenAPI operations from Apify: creator search, video search, lookalike, collection tasks, exports, video audit, outreach, uploads, and raw endpoint calls.

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: Choose the OpenAPI operation to run.

apiKey.title: CreatiVault API Key
apiKey.description: Your CreatiVault OpenAPI key, for example cv_live_xxx.

userIdentity.title: User identity email
userIdentity.description: Value for X-User-Identity. Use the operator email address.

apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: CreatiVault OpenAPI base URL. Usually no change is needed.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Creator search keyword or fallback video title keyword.

countryCode.title: Country code
countryCode.description: Country/region code, comma-separated for multiple values, for example US,CA.

languageCode.title: Language code
languageCode.description: Creator content language code, comma-separated for multiple values, for example en,es.

industry.title: Industry
industry.description: Industry/category filter. Prefer backend-supported category IDs or names.

followersCntLte.title: Followers <=
followersCntLte.description: Maximum followers/subscribers. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgVideoViewsGte.title: Avg views >=
last10AvgVideoViewsGte.description: Minimum average views. Mapped to the correct platform field.

last10AvgVideoViewsLte.title: Avg views <=
last10AvgVideoViewsLte.description: Maximum average views. Leave as 0 to omit.

last10AvgVideoInteractionRateGte.title: Interaction rate >= (%)
last10AvgVideoInteractionRateGte.description: Minimum interaction rate as a 0-100 percentage.

last10AvgVideoInteractionRateLte.title: Interaction rate <= (%)
last10AvgVideoInteractionRateLte.description: Maximum interaction rate as a 0-100 percentage. Leave as 0 to omit.

hasEmail.title: Has email
hasEmail.description: Only return creators with public email contact when supported.

gender.title: Gender
gender.description: female/male or 0/1. The actor maps female to 0 and male to 1 for creator search.

sortField.title: Sort field
sortField.description: Optional sort field. If empty, the actor picks a platform-safe default.

serviceLevel.title: Service level
serviceLevel.description: S1 basic list, S2 precision outreach, S3 deep audience profile.

maxResults.title: Max records
maxResults.description: Maximum records pushed to the Apify dataset for paged operations.

size.title: Page size
size.description: Creator/collection page size max 100; video search max 10.

values.title: Values
values.description: Collection links, usernames, creator profile URLs, or generic value list.

taskId.title: Task ID
taskId.description: Collection, outreach, or video audit task ID.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Optional HTTPS callback URL for collection tasks.

waitForCompletion.title: Wait for completion
waitForCompletion.description: For collection, video audit, and outreach submit operations, poll task status before finishing.

maxPollAttempts.title: Max poll attempts
maxPollAttempts.description: Maximum polling attempts before timing out.

fetchData.title: Fetch collection data
fetchData.description: After a completed collection task, fetch paginated data into the dataset.

exportFormat.title: Export format
exportFormat.description: Collection export format. Set this with waitForCompletion to auto-export.

videoTitle.title: Video title keyword
videoTitle.description: Video title keyword for video search.

videoViewsCntGte.title: Video views >=
videoViewsCntGte.description: Minimum video views for video search.

videoInteractionRateGte.title: Video interaction >= (%)
videoInteractionRateGte.description: Minimum video interaction rate as 0-100 percentage.

videoUrl.title: Video URL
videoUrl.description: TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts URL for video audit.

uploadedOssKey.title: Uploaded OSS key
uploadedOssKey.description: OSS key returned by mediaUpload for video audit.

brief.title: Audit brief
brief.description: Optional customer brief for video audit.

enableBenchmark.title: Enable benchmark
enableBenchmark.description: Compare video audit against benchmark library.

fileUrl.title: File URL
fileUrl.description: Public URL for mediaUpload or outreachUpload.

filename.title: Upload filename
filename.description: Optional filename override for upload operations.

uid.title: Creator UID
uid.description: Creator UID from search results, required for single outreach send.

recipients.title: Outreach recipients
recipients.description: Batch outreach recipients. Each item should include email and uid.

requestBody.title: Advanced request body
requestBody.description: JSON body merged into the generated request body. Values here override mapped fields.

rawBodyJson.title: Raw body JSON string
rawBodyJson.description: Optional JSON string merged after requestBody. Useful when Apify UI cannot express a nested shape.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional. CreatiVault OpenAPI is server-to-server, so a proxy is usually unnecessary.
